revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:会津地方]] to [[Category:Aizu Region]]: Merge [[Category:会津地方]] into [[Category:Aizu Region]] via bot
Merge [[Category:福島県の地域]] into [[Category:Regions of Fukushima Prefecture]] via bot
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[福島県]]の[[会津]]地方に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:あいつ}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|あいつ}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:会津地方]]}} {{translated page|ja|Category:会津地方|version=79522175}} {{translated page|ja|会津地方|comment=idk if categories need this template but doing it because I have OCD ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:37, 21 May 2025 (UTC)|2=Category:会津地方|comment=did a replacement}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Geography of Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Regions of Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Tier 5 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 5 Categories]] [[ja:Category:会津地方]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Aizu_Domain]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] [[zh:Category:會津地方]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
